location: 123 Healing Way, Medical District. Free parking is available in the parking garage behind the clinic; please bring your ticket inside for validation.
klinikLocation: 1407 Mayor Magrath Drive South, Lethbridge, Alberta T1K 2R1. Customer parking is available directly in front of the store.

klinikFaqs.question: What is the warranty policy on repairs?
klinikFaqs.answer: Our repairs typically include a premium lifetime warranty on parts and labor, while battery replacements carry a 1-year warranty. Accidental physical or liquid damage after the repair is excluded.

klinikFaqs.question: Do you charge a diagnostic fee?
klinikFaqs.answer: No, we provide a free diagnostic assessment for your device. We will test its functions and give you an estimate before we perform any repair.

klinikFaqs.question: What devices do you repair?
klinikFaqs.answer: We repair Apple iPhones, iPads, Samsung Galaxy phones, Google Pixel, Motorola, game consoles (Xbox/PlayStation), and computers/laptops.

klinikFaqs.question: Can I mail my phone in if I can't visit the store?
klinikFaqs.answer: Yes! If you can't make it to our Lethbridge store, we offer a convenient Mail-In service. You can register your repair online and mail it to us.
